title: Method for assembling wireless identification tags in concrete processing tools
abstract: A wireless identification tag (110) for embedding into a surface (101) of a concrete processing work tool (102), the wireless identification tag comprising processing circuitry arranged on a carrier member for wireless communication with a corresponding reader (120, 150, 170), wherein the carrier member is arranged at least partially embedded into an enclosing material (M) having a Shore A hardness between 40 and 100, wherein one or more positioning elements are arranged extending out from the carrier member to position the carrier member in the enclosing material.
claims: 1. A wireless identification tag for embedding into a surface of a concrete processing work tool, the wireless identification tag comprising processing circuitry arranged on a carrier member for wireless communication with a corresponding reader, wherein the carrier member is arranged at least partially embedded into an enclosing material having a Shore A hardness between 40 and 100, wherein one or more positioning elements are arranged extending out from the carrier member to position the carrier member in the enclosing material.
